blog_title: Top Things To Do In Mauritius For Foodies And Shopping Enthusiasts
seo_title: Top Things To Do In Mauritius For Foodies And Shopping Enthusiasts
description: Discover the ultimate travel packing list for every adventure. Pack smart, light, and stress-free with essential tips .
body_content:
Published by travelxploria on Thu Jun 19 2025

Mauritius is a picturesque island nestled in the Indian Ocean. It is not only renowned for its stunning beaches and lush landscapes but also for its vibrant culinary scene and bustling markets.

Mauritius’s Top Gourmet And Shopping Attractions:

Discover the top things to do in Mauritius, perfect for those who love to indulge in gastronomic delights and retail therapy, and explore our offers for cheap couple tour packages for Mauritius.

Having a Fresh Seafood Lunch at the Caudan Waterfront:

Start your culinary journey at the Caudan Waterfront, a charming harbor in Port Louis. Dive into the vibrant seafood culture as you savor a fresh seafood lunch at one of the waterfront restaurants. From succulent prawns to delectable lobster, you can get it all. Explore the lively market stalls for exotic spices and local produce, immersing in the rich flavors of Mauritian cuisine. As the sun sets over the Indian Ocean, the Caudan Waterfront transforms into a romantic haven, offering a picturesque backdrop for a delightful evening stroll with your loved one.

Shopping and Dining at the Bagatelle Mall:

Head to the Bagatelle Mall, which is the largest shopping mall in Mauritius. Indulge in a shopping spree, exploring a diverse range of international and local brands. Afterward, visit one of the mall’s upscale restaurants, where you can relish both local and international cuisines in a stylish and modern setting. For foodies and shopping enthusiasts, it offers a myriad of experiences that tantalize the taste buds and cater to the heart of shopaholics.

Bargaining at the Port Louis Central Market:

The Port Louis Central Market is a treasure trove for bargain hunters. Wander through the stalls filled with colorful textiles, handicrafts, and spices. Engage in the art of bargaining with local vendors to score unique souvenirs and gifts at unbeatable prices.

Enjoying Steak at the Savinia:

For those craving a taste of luxury, the Savinia in Grand Baie is the place to be. Indulge in a mouthwatering steak experience amidst elegant surroundings. The restaurant offers a sophisticated menu with a focus on high-quality meat cuts, ensuring a delightful culinary journey for meat aficionados.

Eating at the Champ de Mars Racecourse Food Courts:

For a unique dining experience, head to the Champ de Mars Racecourse food courts. Enjoy a meal while immersing in the excitement of horse racing. The food courts offer a variety of local and international dishes, making it a perfect spot to savor delicious food while being part of the vibrant racing atmosphere.

Munching on Dholl Puri at a Roadside Eatery:

Do not miss the chance to indulge in the famous street food – Dholl Puri, a delicious and satisfying snack. No culinary exploration of Mauritius is complete without trying Dholl Puri. Head to a roadside eatery to experience this popular pancake filled with spiced ground split peas. The simplicity of this snack reflects the authentic flavors of the island and is a must-try for food enthusiasts.

Mauritius is a haven for foodies and shopping enthusiasts, offering a delightful blend of culinary adventures and retail therapy. The island promises an unforgettable experience for those seeking to satisfy their taste buds and shop till they drop into paradise.
